results.reason: Unit tests confirm deregistration removes hooks/executors and plugin manager lifecycle disable/uninstall removes enabled manifests/listed plugins, preventing stale backend plugin state.
Collision behavior is explicit and deterministic: duplicate node type registration is rejected and sorted plugin registration order makes deterministic collision winner/error behavior.
Precedence/load order is explicitly validated: builtin loads first and externals load alphabetically in deterministic order.
Malformed runtime RPC response paths are covered and errors include plugin ID, method context, and stderr/output snippets for empty output, invalid JSON, non-object result, and ok:false envelope.
